---
title: "ANSI5553 Group Project Quarto"
author: "Cody Gruber"
date: today
format: html
embed-resources: true
execute: 
  echo: true
editor: visual
---

Summary Statistics

```{r}
library(dplyr)

chickwts |>
  group_by(feed) |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(weight),
    sd = sd(weight)
  )
```
